domain_focus: Open-domain DocRED document-level relation extraction with country-aware coverage and compact ontology classification using the supplied 96-property ontology.
abstraction_level: shallow, exact named instances, ontology-canonical relations
priority_relations: P131 : located in the administrative territorial entity
P150 : contains the administrative territorial entity
population_policy: Keep exact named endpoints as instances. The single native Layer 1 call may emit controlled country relations when supported. Promote only document-supported relation candidates linked to a P-ID. No post-run closure or direct extractor.
event_modeling_preference: Dates and locations remain endpoint entities. One relation instance must represent exactly one source-predicate-target pair. Separate temporal and locative relations from the same sentence.

typing_examples.text: Northstar Television || is based in || Harbor City

relation_examples.text: Northstar Television is based in Harbor City.
relation_examples.explanation: Organization-to-base-city direction. Keep the exact entities and canonicalize the predicate to P159.

relation_examples.text: Harbor City is in Republic Z.
relation_examples.explanation: Use P17 for a non-human place/entity to its sovereign country.

relation_examples.text: Northstar Television is part of Northstar Media Group.
relation_examples.explanation: In a corporate/group context, test ownership or parent-organization semantics before generic P361.

relation_examples.text: Northstar Research Europe is a subsidiary of Northstar Research.
Northstar Research has subsidiary Northstar Research Europe.
The broadcaster is a member of the Digital Networks Alliance.
relation_examples.explanation: Membership is not ownership, parent organization, or generic part-of.

relation_examples.text: The institute was established in June 2010.
Alex Morgan studied at Central College.
The single was performed by Artist Q.
The single was released by Aurora Records.
Aster TV is a Lydian broadcaster. Port Azure is its base city in Lydia. Aster Media is one of the largest media groups in the country.
relation_examples.explanation: The-country coreference can support a group-to-country relation when the antecedent is unambiguous.

relation_examples.text: Aster TV is part of Aster Media Group.
relation_examples.explanation: Corporate/media-group part-of wording maps to ownership. P749 requires explicit subsidiary, branch, division, laboratory, or unit wording.

relation_examples.text: Aster Broadcasting was relaunched in Port Azure.
relation_examples.explanation: In the DocRED profile, an organization launch/relaunch city is interpreted as its operating/base location.

promotion_examples.explanation: Promote a relation only when a document relation instance selected it.

negative_examples.explanation: Do not replace names with generic labels.

negative_examples.text: one broad expression containing both a date and location

negative_examples.explanation: Reject because the range must be temporal.

negative_examples.text: all 96 ontology properties as mention-free relation candidates
negative_examples.explanation: The vocabulary stays in the seed ontology and retrieval index, not the document candidate set.

negative_examples.text: corporate group part-of -> P749 without branch/subsidiary wording
negative_examples.explanation: Prefer P127; P749 is for explicit organizational child/parent units.

negative_examples.text: full 96-property inventory repeated in every Layer 2 prompt
negative_examples.explanation: Use ontology RAG plus a compact top-five candidate list.

negative_examples.text: post-run country closure creates missing triples
negative_examples.explanation: Forbidden. Country relations must originate in the native Layer 1 relation instances.
